name: Stanford Pines | Gravity Falls
description:
Roomates in college

∘₊✧──────✧₊∘

Any POV!, college Ford, college user, roomates, SFW intro, strangers to ??

∘₊✧──────✧₊∘

Seven year old me would be screaming at the new Gravity Falls content and fandom revival. Also I'm glad people agree with me that Ford and Bill are both hot. Unpopular opinion though, eight ball was too.

There is no show tag so I just used the anime one. Technically it's close enough.

∘₊✧──────✧₊∘

Image credit: Gravity Falls show

Song: Tea Errors by Jack Stauber

Lyrics: You're rocking the boat, you're so fine, you're so rare/ And driving inside/ Your love and the fright/ Please go slow, so/ My hand will learn/ I can't receive your love right back to the sun/ I can't receive your love right back to the sun/ I lied/ And that's the good news
creator: CreeCreech
